AR1.justification: Correctly routed the descriptive pattern to observations.md, but offers no in-band rationale for why observations.md over decisions.md or daybook Log, and uses no ISO-dated header.

AR3.justification: Run did not produce any cross-references between files.

AR4.justification: Append-only on followups.md is fine, but the observations.md heading is undated, so re-running would collide on the same heading rather than producing a new dated entry.
